title: New handling of delta tables hurts badly reusage of bats
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE delta_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO delta_test (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test value');
CREATE TABLE delta_backup (id INTEGER, value TEXT, created_at DATETIME);
INSERT INTO delta_backup (SELECT id, value, created_at FROM delta_test WHERE id IS NOT NULL);
UPDATE delta_test SET value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: New handling of delta tables affects bats reusage
